# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.

Prevent envoy authz filter missing.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

http_filters:
- name: "envoy.http_filters.router"
  config: {} # router configuration here... not shown in this example for brevity, see below about routing filters and retry policies setup
  
static_resources:
  listeners:
    - address: any
      port: 80
      
clusters:
- name: outbound|backend1 # cluster configuration here... not shown in this example for brevity, see below about routing filters and retry policies setup
